@graph.description: This experiment enriches an existing RO-Crate artifact with generated titles, descriptions, and keywords using locally hosted LLMs through Ollama. Different models and prompt context budgets are combined to evaluate how model choice and available artifact context influence metadata quality. Each run produces an enriched RO-Crate artifact together with run manifests, including token and runtime statistics, GPU and energy measurements, and automated comparisons against a human-written reference using BERTScore metric.
@graph.name: Evaluation of Local LLMs for RO-Crate Metadata Enrichment
